description_long: This bungalow is set within a lush, landscaped plot, surrounded by dense greenery and mature trees that provide privacy and shade. The main structure is a single-story building with a modern, geometric design, featuring a prominent glass-walled section, likely a sunroom or greenhouse, on one end. The roof appears flat and extends over a covered entryway, with paved walkways leading to the entrance and around the property. Several outdoor elements, such as a driveway, parked vehicles, and what appear to be garden beds or planters, are integrated into the layout. The property is enclosed by a low boundary, with the majority of the area covered by vegetation and open space. The overall impression is of a contemporary, nature-integrated residence with ample outdoor living and garden areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, glass-walled sunroom, and extensive landscaped gardens surrounded by dense trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass-walled sunroom, main entrance, and dense greenery framing the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked vehicles, and the extensive tree coverage along the perimeter.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the covered entryway, garden beds, and the open, landscaped backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the glass-walled section and the continuous tree border around the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large glass-walled section and scattered windows
